cmd: for u in 'webhook/crm-dashboard' 'webhook/portal?t=probe-invalid'; do curl -s -m 20 -o /tmp/w.html -w "GET /$u -> HTTP %{http_code}, bytes %{size_download}\n" "https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/$u"; LC_ALL=C tr -cd '\11\12\15\40-\176' < /tmp/w.html | head -c 150; echo; done; curl -s -m 20 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' -o /tmp/p.txt -w 'POST /webhook/claude-sheets-proxy -> HTTP %{http_code}, bytes %{size_download}\n' https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/claude-sheets-proxy; LC_ALL=C tr -cd '\11\12\15\40-\176' < /tmp/p.txt | head -c 200
